mapper.select:
select * from company c join ( select c2.com_id, count(e2.emp_id) as emp_count from company c2 left join employee e2 on c2.com_id = e2.com_id group by c2.com_id ) t on t.com_id = c.com_id
and (c.com_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or c.biz_no like '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
and c.industry_grp_code = #{industryGrpCode}
order by c.com_id desc OFFSET #{pstartno} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{onepagelist} ROWS ONLY

select com_id, com_name, biz_no FROM company
and (com_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or biz_no like '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY com_name ASC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: insert into company (com_name, industry_code, industry_grp_code, com_ceo, biz_no, com_tel, com_logo) values (#{comName}, #{industryCode}, #{industryGrpCode}, #{comCeo}, #{bizNo}, #{comTel}, #{comLogo})
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company) AS com_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee) AS emp_total, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT industry_code) FROM company) AS indust_total, (SELECT com_name FROM company ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS com_latest FROM dual
select c.* from company c join employee e on e.com_id = c.com_id where e.emp_id = #{emdId}
